twitter.content:
Little known fact, the Anthropic Labs team (the team I joined Anthropic to be on) shipped:

- MCP
- Skills
- Claude Desktop app
- Claude Code

It was just a few of us, shipping fast, trying to keep pace with what the model was capable of.

Those early Desktop computer use prototypes, back in the Sonnet 3.6 days, felt clunky and slow. But it was easy to squint and imagine all the ways people might use it once it got really good.

Fast forward to today. I am so excited to release full computer use

RT by @bcherny: You can now enable Claude to use your computer to complete tasks.

It opens your apps, navigates your browser, fills in spreadsheets—anything you'd do sitting at your desk.

Research preview in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, macOS only.
You can now enable Claude to use your computer to complete tasks.

It opens your apps, navigates your browser, fills in spreadsheets—anything you'd do sitting at your desk.

Research preview in Claude Cowork and Claude Code, macOS only.

Video

RT by @bcherny: Use /schedule to create recurring cloud-based jobs for Claude, directly from the terminal. 

We use these internally to automatically resolve CI failures, push doc updates, and generally power automations that you want to exists beyond a closed laptop
Use /schedule to create recurring cloud-based jobs for Claude, directly from the terminal. 

We use these internally to automatically resolve CI failures, push doc updates, and generally power automations that you want to exists bey

RT by @bcherny: we're testing a new version of /init based on your feedback- it should interview you and help setup skills, hooks, etc.

you can enable it with this env_var flag:

CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT=1 claude

would love your feedback!
we're testing a new version of /init based on your feedback- it should interview you and help setup skills, hooks, etc.

you can enable it with this env_var flag:

CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT=1 claude

would love your feedback!


Thariq (@trq212)

I want to make /init m

RT by @bcherny: Loops now run for up to 7 days instead of 3. 

Let me know what you’re /looping on!
Loops now run for up to 7 days instead of 3. 

Let me know what you’re /looping on!


Noah Zweben (@noahzweben)

/loop 5m make sure this PR passes CI

While loops for agents have dropped!

code.claude.com/docs/en/sche…

RT by @bcherny: You can now set effort level in skills/slash commands!

This controls how long the model thinks before answering, and overrides your session default
You can now set effort level in skills/slash commands!

This controls how long the model thinks before answering, and overrides your session default

Video

RT by @bcherny: I put a lot of heart into my technical writing, I hope it's useful to you all. 

📌 Here's a pinned thread of everything I've written.

(much of this will be posted on the Claude blog soon as well)
I put a lot of heart into my technical writing, I hope it's useful to you all. 

📌 Here's a pinned thread of everything I've written.

(much of this will be posted on the Claude blog soon as well)

Join our team
Join our team


Reem Ateyeh (@reem_a)

I'm hiring someone to join my team at Anthropic to lead Claude Code comms.

This is not a role for someone who wants to run an old playbook. You'll need to be a Claude Code super user, understand developers and dev tools, and have great taste. You'll work hard, learn a lot, and ship with the best people around.

Non-traditional comms paths welcome. My DMs are open!



— https://nitter.net/reem_a/status/2034731159385776320#m

Desktop and http://claude.ai should be feeling faster
Desktop and claude.ai should be feeling faster


Felix Rieseberg (@felixrieseberg)

A small ship I love: We made Claude.ai and our desktop apps meaningful faster this week.

We moved our architecture from SSR to a static @vite_js & @tan_stack router setup that we can serve straight from workers at the edge. Time to first byte is down 65% at p75, prompts show up 50% sooner, navigation is snappier.

We're not done (not even close!) but we care

RT by @bcherny: You can now schedule recurring cloud-based tasks on Claude Code.

Set a repo (or repos), a schedule, and a prompt. Claude runs it via cloud infra on your schedule, so you don’t need to keep Claude Code running on your local machine.
You can now schedule recurring cloud-based tasks on Claude Code.

Set a repo (or repos), a schedule, and a prompt. Claude runs it via cloud infra on your schedule, so you don’t need to keep Claude Code running on your local machine.

Video

RT by @bcherny: The PM playbook was built on an assumption that the technology underneath your product is roughly stable

With the current pace of model progress, this is no longer true. Here's how we've evolved the PM role:
The PM playbook was built on an assumption that the technology underneath your product is roughly stable

With the current pace of model progress, this is no longer true. Here's how we've evolved the PM role:

RT by @bcherny: Claude Code on desktop lets you select DOM elements directly, much easier than describing which component you want updated!

Claude gets the tag, classes, key styles, surrounding HTML, and a cropped screenshot. React apps also get the source file, component name and props
Claude Code on desktop lets you select DOM elements directly, much easier than describing which component you want updated!

Claude gets the tag, classes, key styles, surrounding HTML, and a cropped screenshot.

RT by @bcherny: Today's ship: Projects in Cowork! Built in memory across tasks is super useful, as is having a shared folder & connections setup for a group of tasks.
Today's ship: Projects in Cowork! Built in memory across tasks is super useful, as is having a shared folder & connections setup for a group of tasks.

Let us know what you think!
Let us know what you think!


Thariq (@trq212)

We just released Claude Code channels, which allows you to control your Claude Code session through select MCPs, starting with Telegram and Discord. 

Use this to message Claude Code directly from your phone.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/trq212/status/2034761016320696565#m

RT by @bcherny: Claude Cowork is mind-blowing.

I still cannot believe you can do this on your phone and then come back to your computer to a complete report on the best plane tickets to buy.

I wonder where we'll be by the end of the year.
Claude Cowork is mind-blowing.

I still cannot believe you can do this on your phone and then come back to your computer to a complete report on the best plane tickets to buy.

I wonder where we'll be by the end of the year.

RT by @bcherny: And another thing... Skills and a bunch of /slash commands (/clear, /compact) etc now work over mobile in Remote Control.  As a heads up we dont have auto-complete yet so better get those spelling-bee skills sharpened :)  

Update to latest cc & mobile

Claude (@claudeai)

Our developer conference Code with Claude returns this spring, this time in San Francisco, London, and Tokyo. 

Join us for a full day of workshops, demos, and 1:1 office hours with teams behind Claude.

Register to watch from anywhere or apply to attend: claude.com/code-with-claude
